title: User Greeting
description: Display a personalized greeting if the user is logged in, otherwise show a login message.
problemStatement:
Choose which view! Create a component `AuthStatus` that takes a boolean prop `isLoggedIn`. If true, return `"Welcome back!"`, otherwise return `"Please sign in."`.

**Requirement:** Use a ternary operator inside the return JSX.
hints: In JSX, you can use `{ condition ? trueValue : falseValue }` for simple conditions.
